sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56849" key="*kerea/tas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κερεάτας</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, epith. of Apollo in Arcadia, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:34:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.34.5</biblScope> </bibl>: perh. from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κέρας</foreign>, cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Κάρνειος</foreign>.</entryFree>
